scenarios.name: Dashboard refresh only
scenarios.description: Refresh the public dashboard artifact while leaving the support-report bundle untouched.

scenarios.name: Support report sprint
scenarios.description: Refresh the support-report bundle but leave the dashboard artifact stale.

scenarios.name: Top-risk stabilization
scenarios.description: Refresh the highest-risk support outputs first, but leave lower-risk artifacts pending.

scenarios.name: Full artifact refresh
scenarios.description: Refresh every stale artifact so the published surface is fully current.
